title: Eligibility: net tangible assets ≥ ₹3 cr each year
text: it has net tangible assets of at least three crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), of which not more than fifty per cent. are held in monetary assets: Provided that if more than fifty per cent. of the net tangible assets are held in monetary assets, the issuer has utilised or made firm commitments to utilise such excess monetary assets in its business or project; Provided further that the limit of fifty per cent. on monetary assets shall not be applicable in case the initial public offer is made entirely through an offer for sale.
notes: Map to net_tangible_assets ≥ 3cr (restated, consolidated) in each of last 3 years, with conditions on monetary assets and offer for sale.

source.reg: Eligibility requirements for an initial public offer
source.span_hint: net tangible assets of at least

title: Eligibility: avg operating profit ≥ ₹15 cr and each year ≥ ₹15 cr
text: it has an average operating profit of at least fifteen crore rupees, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, during the preceding three years (of twelve months each), with operating profit in each of these preceding three years.
notes: Map to operating_profits average ≥ 15cr (restated, consolidated) over last 3 years, and each year ≥ 15cr.

source.reg: Eligibility requirements for an initial public offer
source.span_hint: average operating profit of at least

title: Eligibility: net worth ≥ ₹1 cr each year
text: it has a net worth of at least one crore rupees in each of the preceding three full years (of twelve months each), calculated on a restated and consolidated basis.
notes: Map to net_worth ≥ 1cr (restated, consolidated) in each of last 3 years.

source.reg: Eligibility requirements for an initial public offer
source.span_hint: net worth of at least

title: Name change with 50% revenue from new activity
text: if it has changed its name within the last one year, at least fifty per cent. of the revenue, calculated on a restated and consolidated basis, for the preceding one full year has been earned by it from the activity indicated by its new name.
notes: Map to has_changed_name, revenue_percentage >=50%, time_period=1 year, basis=restated consolidated

source.span_hint: if it has changed its name

title: Condition for SR equity shares issuance
text: If an issuer has issued SR equity shares to its promoters/ founders, the said issuer shall be allowed to do an initial public offer of only ordinary shares for listing on the Main Board subject to compliance with the provisions of this Chapter and these clauses -
notes: If SR equity shares issued, must comply with Chapter and these clauses

source.span_hint: If an issuer has issued SR equity shares

title: Technology-intensive business requirement
text: the issuer shall be intensive in the use of technology, information technology, intellectual property, data analytics, bio-technology or nano-technology to provide products, services or business platforms with substantial value addition.
notes: Must be intensive in specified technologies for value addition

source.span_hint: intensive in the use of technology

title: Listing approval with designated exchange
text: it has made an application to one or more stock exchanges to seek an in-principle approval for listing of its specified securities on such stock exchanges and has chosen one of them as the designated stock exchange, in terms of Schedule XIX;
notes: Map to listing_approval and designated_exchange.

source.span_hint: application to one or more stock exchanges

title: Depository dematerialisation agreement
text: it has entered into an agreement with a depository for dematerialisation of the specified securities already issued and proposed to be issued;
notes: Map to depository_agreement and dematerialisation.

source.span_hint: entered into an agreement with a depository

title: Promoter shares dematerialised
text: all its specified securities held by the promoters are in dematerialised form prior to filing of the offer document;
notes: Map to promoter_dematerialised_shares.

source.span_hint: specified securities held by the promoters

title: Partly paid-up equity shares fully paid or forfeited
text: all its existing partly paid-up equity shares have either been fully paid-up or have been forfeited;
notes: Map to existing_partly_paid_up_equity_shares being fully paid or forfeited.

source.span_hint: existing partly paid-up equity shares

title: Finance arrangement for 75% project funding
text: it has made firm arrangements of finance through verifiable means towards seventy five per cent. of the stated means of finance for a specific project proposed to be funded from the proceeds of the issue;
notes: Map to finance_arrangement covering 75% of the stated means.

source.span_hint: firm arrangements of finance through verifiable means

title: Definition of project
text: “project” means the object for which monies are proposed to be raised to cover the objects of the issue;
notes: Map to project definition in ICDR context

source.span_hint: “project” means the object for which monies are proposed to be raised

title: Requirements for partnership issuers
text: In case of an issuer which had been a partnership firm or a limited liability partnership, the track record of operating profit of the partnership firm or the limited liability partnership shall be considered only if the financial statements of the partnership business for the period during which the issuer was a partnership firm or a limited liability partnership, conform to and are revised in the format prescribed for companies under the Companies Act, 2013 and also comply with the following: (a) adequate disclosures are made in the financial statements as required to be made by the issuer as per schedule III of the Companies Act, 2013; (b) the financial statements are duly certified by the statutory auditor stating (i) the accounts and the disclosures made are in accordance with the provisions of schedule III of the Companies Act, 2013; (ii) the applicable accounting standards have been followed; (iii) the financial statements present a true and fair view of the firm’s accounts;
notes: Map to financial_statement_requirements for partnership issuers, including disclosures and certification

source.span_hint: In case of an issuer which had been a partnership firm

title: Requirements for spun-off divisions
text: In case of an issuer formed out of a division of an existing company, the track record of distributable profits of the division spun-off shall be considered only if the requirements regarding financial statements as provided for partnership firms or limited liability partnerships in Explanation (II) are complied with.
notes: Map to financial_statement_compliance for spun-off divisions, referencing Explanation (II)

source.span_hint: In case of an issuer formed out of a division

title: Maximum 35% for unacquired/invested funds
text: The amount raised for objects where the issuer company has not identified acquisition or investment target shall not exceed thirty five per cent of the amount being raised by the issuer.
notes: Map to max_unacquired_percent=35%.

source.span_hint: shall not exceed thirty five per cent

title: Maximum 25% for unacquired/invested funds
text: The amount raised for objects where the issuer company has not identified acquisition or investment target shall not exceed twenty five per cent of the amount being raised by the issuer.
notes: Map to max_unacquired_percent=25%.

source.span_hint: shall not exceed twenty five per cent

title: Exception: Acquisition/investment identified with disclosures
text: Such limits shall not apply if the proposed acquisition or strategic investment object has been identified and suitable specific disclosures about such acquisitions or investments are made in the draft offer document and the offer document at the time of filing of offer documents.
notes: Map to has_acquisition_identified + has_disclosures_acquisition.

source.span_hint: such limits shall not apply if

title: One-year holding period for equity shares
text: Only such fully paid-up equity shares may be offered for sale to the public, which have been held by the sellers for a period of at least one year prior to the filing of the draft offer document.
notes: Map to holding_period_min=1 year for equity_shares.

source.span_hint: Only such fully paid-up equity shares may be offered for sale

title: Compliance timing for holding period
text: Such holding period of one year shall be required to be complied with at the time of filing of the draft offer document.
notes: Map to holding_period_compliance_at_filing.

source.span_hint: Provided further that such holding period of one year shall be required to be complied with

title: Exception: Conversion/exchange completed before filing
text: The requirement of holding equity shares for a period of one year shall not apply if the conversion or exchange should be completed prior to filing of the offer document (i.e. red herring prospectus in the case of a book built issue and prospectus in the case of a fixed price issue), provided full disclosures of the terms of conversion or exchange are made in the draft offer document.
notes: Map to holding_period_exception if conversion completed before filing + disclosures made.

source.span_hint: Provided further that the requirement of holding equity shares for a period of one year shall not apply

title: Security asset cover after liability reduction
text: the security or asset cover shall be arrived at after reduction of the liabilities having a first or prior charge, in case the convertible debt instruments are secured by a second or subsequent charge.
notes: Map to security_cover calculation after reducing first/prior charge liabilities.

source.span_hint: security or asset cover

title: Redemption in terms of offer document
text: The issuer shall redeem the convertible debt instruments in terms of the offer document.
notes: Map to redemption obligation based on offer document terms.

source.span_hint: issuer shall redeem

title: No conversion without consent
text: The issuer shall not convert its optionally convertible debt instruments into equity shares unless the holders of such convertible debt instruments have sent their positive consent to the issuer and non-receipt of reply to any notice sent by the issuer for this purpose shall not be construed as consent for conversion of any convertible debt instruments.
notes: Map to consent requirement for conversion; ensure holder consent is obtained.

source.span_hint: issuer shall not convert

title: Option to not convert if not determined
text: Where the value of the convertible portion of any listed convertible debt instruments issued by an issuer exceeds ten crore rupees and the issuer has not determined the conversion price of such convertible debt instruments at the time of making the issue, the holders of such convertible debt instruments shall be given the option of not converting the convertible portion into equity shares
notes: Map to debt_instrument_value > 10 crore and no conversion_price_determined; enforce option to not convert.

source.span_hint: value of the convertible portion

title: No option required if upper limit disclosed
text: Provided that where the upper limit on the price of such convertible debt instruments and justification thereon is determined and disclosed to the investors at the time of making the issue, it shall not be necessary to give such option to the holders of the convertible debt instruments for converting the convertible portion into equity share capital within the said upper limit.
notes: Map to upper_limit_disclosed; exception to giving conversion option.

source.span_hint: upper limit on the price

title: Redemption if option not exercised
text: Where an option is to be given to the holders of the convertible debt instruments in terms of sub-regulation (2) and if one or more of such holders do not exercise the option to convert the instruments into equity share capital at a price determined in the general meeting of the shareholders, the issuer shall redeem that part of the instruments within one month from the last date by which option is to be exercised, at a price which shall not be less than its face value.
notes: Map to redemption obligation if conversion option not exercised; redemption price ≥ face value.

source.span_hint: issuer shall redeem

title: Exception for redemption as per disclosures
text: The provision of sub-regulation (2) shall not apply if such redemption is as per the disclosures made in the offer document.
notes: Map to redemption exception based on offer document disclosures.

source.span_hint: provision of sub-regulation (2)

title: No issuance to promoter group
text: An issuer shall not issue convertible debt instruments for financing or for providing loans to or for acquiring shares of any person who is part of the promoter group or group companies:
notes: Map to prohibition on issuing debt to promoter group or group companies.

source.span_hint: issuer shall not issue

title: Eligibility for short-term convertible debt
text: Provided that an issuer shall be eligible to issue fully convertible debt instruments for these purposes if the period of conversion of such debt instruments is less than eighteen months from the date of issue of such debt instruments.
notes: Map to conversion_period < 18 months for eligibility to issue fully convertible debt.

source.span_hint: issuer shall be eligible

title: Warrant tenure maximum 18 months
text: the tenure of such warrants shall not exceed eighteen months from the date of their allotment in the initial public offer;
notes: Map to warrant_tenure <= 18 months.

source.span_hint: tenure of such warrants shall not exceed

title: Multiple warrants per security
text: a specified security may have one or more warrants attached to it;
notes: Map to warrants_per_security can be multiple.

source.span_hint: a specified security may have one or more warrants

title: Exercise price and upfront payment for warrants
text: the price or formula for determination of exercise price of the warrants shall be determined upfront and disclosed in the offer document and at least twenty-five per cent. of the consideration amount based on the exercise price shall also be received upfront;
notes: Map to exercise_price_defined_upfront and consideration_25_percent_upfront.

source.span_hint: price or formula for determination

title: Upfront payment for formula-based exercise price
text: in case the exercise price of warrants is based on a formula, twenty-five per cent. consideration amount based on the cap price of the price band determined for the linked equity shares or convertible securities shall be received upfront.
notes: Map to if exercise_price_formula, consideration_25_percent_cap_price.

source.span_hint: in case the exercise price

title: Minimum promoters' post-issue capital
text: The promoters of the issuer shall hold at least twenty per cent. of the post-issue capital:
notes: Map to promoters_shareholding min 20%.

source.span_hint: promoters of the issuer shall hold at least twenty per cent.

title: Carve-out for shortfall contribution by other entities
text: Provided that in case the post-issue shareholding of the promoters is less than twenty per cent., alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India or any non-individual public shareholder holding at least five per cent. of the post-issue capital or any entity (individual or non-individual) forming part of promoter group other than the promoter(s) may contribute to meet the shortfall in minimum contribution as specified for the promoters, subject to a maximum of ten per cent. of the post-issue capital without being identified as promoter(s).
notes: Map to shortfall_covered_by_others with max 10% without being promoters.

source.span_hint: Provided that in case

title: No requirement if no identifiable promoter
text: Provided further that the requirement of minimum promoters’ contribution shall not apply in case an issuer does not have any identifiable promoter.
notes: Map to no_promoters_exempt.

source.span_hint: Provided further that the requirement

title: Promoters' contribution requirement
text: the promoters shall contribute twenty per cent. as stipulated in sub-regulation (1), as the case may be, either by way of equity shares38[, including SR equity shares held, if any,] or by way of subscription to convertible securities: Provided that if the price of the equity shares allotted pursuant to conversion is not pre-determined and not disclosed in the offer document, the promoters shall contribute only by way of subscription to the convertible securities being issued in the public issue and shall undertake in writing to subscribe to the equity shares pursuant to conversion of such securities.
notes: Map to promoters_contribution: 20%, methods: equity shares or convertible securities, with conditions on price determination.

source.span_hint: promoters shall contribute twenty per cent

title: Promoters' contribution price for convertible securities
text: in case of any issue of convertible securities which are convertible or exchangeable on different dates and if the promoters’ contribution is by way of equity shares (conversion price being pre-determined), such contribution shall not be at a price lower than the weighted average price of the equity share capital arising out of conversion of such securities.
notes: Map to promoters_contribution price constraint for convertible securities.

source.span_hint: in case of any issue

title: Promoters' contribution for convertible debt without prior equity
text: subject to the provisions of clause (a) and (b) above, in case of an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments without a prior public issue of equity shares, the promoters shall bring in a contribution of at least twenty per cent. of the project cost in the form of equity shares, subject to contributing at least twenty per cent. of the issue size from their own funds in the form of equity shares: Provided that if the project is to be implemented in stages, the promoters’ contribution shall be with respect to total equity participation till the respective stage vis-à-vis the debt raised or proposed to be raised through the public issue.
notes: Map to promoters_contribution: 20% of project cost and 20% of issue size, with staged implementation conditions.

source.span_hint: subject to the provisions

title: Escrow for promoters' contribution
text: In case the promoters have to subscribe to equity shares or convertible securities towards minimum promoters’ contribution, the amount of promoters’ contribution shall be kept in an escrow account with a scheduled commercial bank, which shall be released to the issuer along with the release of the issue proceeds: Provided that where the promoters’ contribution has already been brought in and utilised, the issuer shall give the cash flow statement disclosing the use of such funds in the offer document; Provided further that where the minimum promoters’ contribution is more than one hundred crore rupees and the initial public offer is for partly paid shares, the promoters shall bring in at least one hundred crore rupees before the date of opening of the issue and the remaining amount may be brought on a pro-rata basis before the calls are made to the public.
notes: Map to escrow account for promoters' contribution, with conditions for large amounts and partly paid shares.

source.span_hint: In case the promoters have to subscribe

title: Payment of difference by specified entities
text: if the promoters and alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India or any non-individual public shareholder holding at least five per cent. of the post-issue capital or any entity (individual or non-individual) forming part of promoter group other than the promoter(s), as applicable, pay to the issuer the difference between the price at which the specified securities are offered in the initial public offer and the price at which the specified securities had been acquired;
notes: Map to entities that must pay difference, including promoters, AIFs, banks, etc., and the condition on payment.

source.span_hint: if the promoters

title: Acquisition of securities under specific schemes
text: if such specified securities are acquired in terms of the scheme under sections 230 to 234 of the Companies Act, 2013, as approved by a High Court or a tribunal or the Central Government, as applicable, by the promoters in lieu of business and invested capital that had been in existence for a period of more than one year prior to such approval;
notes: Map to conditions on acquisition of securities with approval requirements.

source.span_hint: if such specified securities

title: Eligibility for infrastructure sector entities
text: to an initial public offer by a government company, statutory authority or corporation or any special purpose vehicle set up by any of them, which is engaged in the infrastructure sector;
notes: Map to issuer being a government entity or infrastructure-focused SPV.

source.span_hint: to an initial public offer

title: Exception for promoters in converted partnership firms
text: in case of an issuer formed by conversion of one or more partnership firms or limited liability partnerships, where the partners of the erstwhile partnership firms or limited liability partnerships are the promoters of the issuer and there is no change in the management
notes: Map to issuer_formed_by_conversion + no_change_in_management + partners_become_promoters

source.span_hint: in case of an issuer formed by conversion

title: Eligibility for pledged specified securities under certain conditions
text: shall be eligible for the computation of promoters’ contribution if such securities are acquired pursuant to a scheme which has been approved by a High Court approved by a tribunal or the Central Government under sections 230 to 234 of the Companies Act, 2013
notes: Map to promoter_shares_eligible_if_acquired_via_approved_scheme + court_approval + tribunal_approval + central_gov_approval + sections_230_to_234

source.span_hint: shall be eligible for the computation

title: Lock-in period for non-promoter shareholders
text: The entire pre-issue capital held by persons other than the promoters shall be locked-in for a period of six months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
notes: Map to lock_in_period for non_promoter_shareholders = 6 months.

source.span_hint: The entire pre-issue capital held by persons other than the promoters shall be locked-in

title: Exception: Employee stock options
text: Equity shares allotted to employees under an employee stock option or employee stock purchase scheme or a stock appreciation right scheme prior to the initial public offer shall be exempt from lock-in if full disclosures are made in accordance with Part A of Schedule VI.
notes: Map to employee_stock_options with full disclosures in Schedule VI.

source.span_hint: equity shares allotted to employees, whether currently an employee or not

title: Exception: Employee stock option trust
text: Equity shares held by an employee stock option trust or transferred to employees by the trust shall be exempt from lock-in if exercised in accordance with the employee stock option plan or employee stock purchase scheme or a stock appreciation rights scheme.
notes: Map to employee_stock_option_trust shares with compliance to employee stock option plan.

source.span_hint: equity shares held by an employee stock option trust

title: Exception: Venture capital funds
text: Equity shares held by a venture capital fund or alternative investment fund of category I or Category II or a foreign venture capital investor shall be locked-in for a period of at least six months from the date of purchase.
notes: Map to lock_in_period for venture_capital_funds = 6 months.

source.span_hint: equity shares held by a venture capital fund or alternative investment fund

title: Holding period for converted securities
text: For the purpose of clause (c), in case such equity shares have resulted pursuant to conversion of fully paid-up compulsorily convertible securities, the holding period of such convertible securities as well as that of resultant equity shares together shall be considered for the purpose of calculation of six months period, and convertible securities shall be deemed to be fully paid-up, if the entire consideration payable thereon has been paid and no further consideration is payable at the time of their conversion.
notes: Map holding_period (combined) and fully_paid condition.

source.span_hint: holding period of such convertible securities

title: Holding period for bonus issues
text: For the purpose of clause (c), in case such equity shares have resulted pursuant to a bonus issue, then the holding period of such equity shares against which the bonus issue is made as well as holding period of resultant bonus equity shares together shall be considered for the purpose of calculation of six months period, subject to (a) bonus shares issued out of free reserves and share premium as at end of preceding financial year; and (b) bonus shares not issued by utilisation of revaluation reserves or unrealized profits.
notes: Map holding_period (combined) and bonus_issuance conditions (reserves, not from revaluation).

source.span_hint: holding period of such equity shares against which

title: Equity shares from ESOP/SAR schemes
text: For the purpose of clauses (a) and (b), equity shares shall include any equity shares allotted pursuant to a bonus issue against equity shares allotted pursuant to an employee stock option or employee stock purchase scheme or a stock appreciation right scheme.
notes: Map equity_shares to include those from ESOP, SAR, bonus issues.

source.span_hint: equity shares shall include any equity shares allotted

title: Lock-in exception for green shoe securities
text: The lock-in provisions shall not apply with respect to the specified securities lent to stabilising agent for the purpose of green shoe option, during the period starting from the date of filing of the red herring prospectus (in case of book-built issues) or the prospectus (in case of fixed price issues).
notes: Map lock_in_exemption to securities lent for green shoe, effective from filing date.

source.span_hint: lock-in provisions shall not apply

title: Reference date for eligibility conditions
text: Unless otherwise provided in this Chapter, an issuer making an initial public offer shall satisfy the conditions of this Chapter as on the date of filing of the draft offer document with the Board and also as on the date of filing the offer document with the Registrar of Companies.
notes: Map to filing_dates: draft_offer and offer (Registrar Companies) with conditions as of those dates.

source.span_hint: date of filing of the draft offer document

title: Disqualification: issuer/promoters/directors/sellers debarred
text: Not eligible if issuer, any promoter/promoter group/director/selling shareholder is debarred from accessing capital markets by SEBI (unless past debarment has expired).
notes: Map to is_debarred + has_debarred_directors + selling_shareholders_debarred.

source.span_hint: if the issuer, any of its promoters

title: Disqualification: promoter/director of another debarred company
text: Not eligible if any promoter/director is promoter/director of another company debarred by SEBI.
notes: Add a relational check (director cross-links).

source.span_hint: if any of the promoters or directors

title: Disqualification: wilful defaulter or fraudulent borrower
text: Not eligible if issuer/promoters/directors is/were wilful defaulter or fraudulent borrower.
notes: Map to is_fraudulent.

source.span_hint: if the issuer or any of its promoters

title: Disqualification: fugitive economic offender
text: Not eligible if any promoter/director is a fugitive economic offender.
notes: Map to is_fugitive.

source.span_hint: if any of its promoters or directors

title: No outstanding convertibles/rights (pre-IPO)
text: Not eligible if there are outstanding convertible securities or rights to receive equity before filing, except for certain employee stock options and SARs (fully exercised pre-offer with disclosures) and mandatorily convertible securities (converted by filing date).
notes: Your ESOP/SAR/mandatory conversion carve-outs match this.

source.span_hint: if there are any outstanding convertible securities

title: Carve-outs for certain securities
text: Not eligible if outstanding options/rights/convertibles unless: (a) ESOPs/SARs fully exercised pre-RHP/prospectus with disclosures; (b) convertible securities converted by filing date.
notes: Carve-outs for ESOPs, SARs, and convertible securities.

source.span_hint: outstanding options granted to employees

title: Net tangible assets monetary assets condition
text: If more than 50% of net tangible assets are held in monetary assets, the issuer has utilised or made firm commitments to utilise such excess.
notes: Map to net_tangible_assets_monetary ≤ 50% or utilised.

source.span_hint: not more than fifty per cent are held in monetary assets

title: Monetary assets limit ineligibility condition
text: The limit of 50% on monetary assets shall not be applicable if the initial public offer is made entirely through an offer for sale.
notes: Map to monetary_assets_limit waived for offer-for-sale.

source.span_hint: the limit of fifty per cent on monetary assets shall not be applicable

title: Intensive use of specified technologies
text: the issuer shall be intensive in the use of technology, information technology, intellectual property, data analytics, bio-technology or nano-technology to provide products, services or business platforms with substantial value addition.
notes: Map to is_technology_intensive.

source.span_hint: the issuer shall be intensive

title: SR shareholder net worth limit
text: the net worth of the SR shareholder, as determined by a Registered Valuer, shall not be more than rupees one thousand crore.
notes: Map to sr_shareholder_net_worth <= 1000 cr.

source.span_hint: the net worth of the SR shareholder

title: SR shares to promoters with executive positions
text: The SR shares were issued only to the promoters/ founders who hold an executive position in the issuer company;
notes: Map to sr_shares_issued_to_executive_promoters.

source.span_hint: The SR shares were issued only

title: Special resolution for SR equity issue
text: The issue of SR equity shares had been authorized by a special resolution passed at a general meeting of the shareholders of the issuer, where the notice calling for such general meeting specifically provided for - a. b.
notes: Map to special_resolution_required, with specific provisions for size and voting rights.

source.span_hint: The issue of SR equity shares

title: SR equity shares holding period
text: The SR equity shares have been issued prior to the filing of the draft red herring prospectus and held for a period of at least three months prior to the filing of the red herring prospectus.
notes: Map to sr_equity_shares_holding_period ≥ 3 months.

source.span_hint: SR equity shares have been issued prior

title: Maximum 35% for specified purposes
text: The amount raised for (i) general corporate purposes, and (ii) such objects where the issuer company has not identified acquisition or investment target, as mentioned in objects of the issue in the draft offer document and the offer document, shall not exceed thirty five per cent of the amount being raised by the issuer.
notes: Map to total_issue_amount and limits on untargeted investments.

source.span_hint: shall not exceed thirty five per cent

title: Reduced 25% limit for untargeted objects if no target
text: Provided that the amount raised for such objects where the issuer company has not identified acquisition or investment target, as mentioned in objects of the issue in the draft offer document and the offer document, shall not exceed twenty five per cent of the amount being raised by the issuer.
notes: Carve out for untargeted objects when no target is identified.

source.span_hint: shall not exceed twenty five per cent

title: Exception to limits if target identified
text: Provided further that such limits shall not apply if the proposed acquisition or strategic investment object has been identified and suitable specific disclosures about such acquisitions or investments are made in the draft offer document and the offer document at the time of filing of offer documents.
notes: If target identified and disclosures made, limits may not apply.

source.span_hint: such limits shall not apply

title: Combined holding period for converted shares
text: Provided that in case the equity shares received on conversion or exchange of fully paid-up compulsorily convertible securities including depository receipts are being offered for sale, the holding period of such convertible securities, including depository receipts, as well as that of resultant equity shares together shall be considered for the purpose of calculation of one year period referred in this sub-regulation.
notes: For converted shares, combined holding period counts.

source.span_hint: Provided that in case the equity shares received on conversion

title: Conversion must be completed prior to filing with disclosures
text: Explanation: If the equity shares arising out of the conversion or exchange of the fully paid-up compulsorily convertible securities are being offered for sale, the conversion or exchange should be completed prior to filing of the offer document (i.e. red herring prospectus in the case of a book built issue and prospectus in the case of a fixed price issue), provided full disclosures of the terms of conversion or exchange are made in the draft offer document.
notes: Conversion completed before filing, with disclosures in draft offer document.

source.span_hint: Explanation: If the equity shares arising out of the conversion

title: Limit on share sales by large shareholders (>20%)
text: a. shares offered for sale to the public by shareholder(s) holding, individually or with persons acting in concert, more than twenty per cent of pre-issue shareholding of the issuer based on fully diluted basis, shall not exceed more than fifty per cent of their pre-issue shareholding on fully diluted basis;
notes: Map to shareholder shareholding percentage and maximum sale limit.

source.reg: Additional conditions for an offer for sale
source.span_hint: shares offered for sale to the public

title: Limit on share sales by small shareholders (<20%)
text: b. shares offered for sale to the public by shareholder(s) holding, individually or with persons acting in concert, less than twenty per cent of pre-issue shareholding of the issuer based on fully diluted basis, shall not exceed more than ten per cent of pre-issue shareholding of the issuer on fully diluted basis;
notes: Map to shareholder shareholding percentage and maximum sale limit.

source.reg: Additional conditions for an offer for sale
source.span_hint: shares offered for sale to the public

title: Lock-in provisions for large shareholders (>20%)
text: c. for shareholder(s) holding, individually or with persons acting in concert, more than twenty per cent of pre-issue shareholding of the issuer based on fully diluted basis, provisions of lock-in as specified under regulation 17 of these regulations shall be
notes: Map to lock-in requirements under SEBI ICDR Regulation 17.

source.reg: Additional conditions for an offer for sale
source.span_hint: for shareholder(s) holding

title: Calculation of limits for shareholder holdings
text: The limits set out in (a) and (b) above shall be calculated with reference to the shareholding as on the date of filing of the draft offer document and shall apply cumulatively to the total number of shares offered for sale to the public and any secondary sale transactions prior to the issue.
notes: Map to shareholder_holding calculations and cumulative application.

source.span_hint: limits set out in (a) and (b) above

title: Eligibility for convertible debt IPO without prior equity
text: An issuer shall be eligible to make an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments even without making a prior public issue of its equity shares and listing thereof.
notes: Issuer can proceed with convertible debt IPO without prior equity public offer or listing.

source.span_hint: An issuer shall be eligible

title: No default in debt payments for more than six months
text: Provided that it is not in default of payment of interest or repayment of principal amount in respect of debt instruments issued by it to the public, if any, for a period of more than six months.
notes: Check for no defaults exceeding six months in debt payments.

source.span_hint: Provided that it is not in default

title: Credit rating requirement
text: it has obtained credit rating from at least one credit rating agency;
notes: At least one credit rating agency must have rated the issuer.

source.span_hint: credit rating from at least one credit rating agency

title: Debenture trustee appointment
text: it has appointed at least one debenture trustee in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Debenture Trustees) Regulations, 1993;
notes: Appoint at least one debenture trustee as per specified regulations.

source.span_hint: appointed at least one debenture trustee

title: Debenture redemption reserve creation
text: it shall create a debenture redemption reserve in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules made thereunder;
notes: Create debenture redemption reserve as per Companies Act and rules.

source.span_hint: create a debenture redemption reserve

title: Condition for creating charge on assets
text: if the issuer proposes to create a charge or security on its assets in respect of secured convertible debt instruments, it shall ensure that:
notes: If creating security, ensure assets are sufficient and free from encumbrances.

source.span_hint: if the issuer proposes to create a charge

title: Assets sufficient for principal discharge
text: such assets are sufficient to discharge the principal amount at all times;
notes: Assets must be adequate to cover principal amount.

source.span_hint: such assets are sufficient to discharge the principal amount

title: Assets free from encumbrance
text: such assets are free from any encumbrance;
notes: Assets should not have any existing liens or charges.

source.span_hint: such assets are free from any encumbrance

title: Consent for existing security or leasehold land
text: where security is already created on such assets in favour of any existing lender or security trustee or the issue of convertible debt instruments is proposed to be secured by creation of security on a leasehold land, the consent of such lender or security trustee or
notes: Obtain consent from existing lenders if security is already created.

source.span_hint: where security is already created

title: Security cover for second charge
text: the security or asset cover shall be arrived at after reduction of the liabilities having a first or prior charge, in case the convertible debt instruments are secured by a second or subsequent charge.
notes: Map to security_cover calculation after reducing first charge liabilities.

source.span_hint: security or asset cover shall be arrived

title: Conversion option if price not determined
text: Where the value of the convertible portion of any listed convertible debt instruments issued by an issuer exceeds ten crore rupees and the issuer has not determined the conversion price of such convertible debt instruments at the time of making the issue, the holders of such convertible debt instruments shall be given the option of not converting the convertible portion into equity shares: Provided that where the upper limit on the price of such convertible debt instruments and justification thereon is determined and disclosed to the investors at the time of making the issue, it shall not be necessary to give such option to the holders of the convertible debt instruments for converting the convertible portion into equity share capital within the said upper limit.
notes: If convertible debt value > ₹10 cr and conversion price not set, holders must be given option not to convert; exception if upper limit and justification disclosed.

source.reg: Conversion of optionally convertible debt instruments into equity shares
source.span_hint: Where the value of the convertible portion

title: Restriction on issuing convertible debt to promoters
text: An issuer shall not issue convertible debt instruments for financing or for providing loans to or for acquiring shares of any person who is part of the promoter group or group companies: Provided that an issuer shall be eligible to issue fully convertible debt instruments for these purposes if the period of conversion of such debt instruments is less than eighteen months from the date of issue of such debt instruments.
notes: Cannot issue convertible debt to promoter-related parties unless fully convertible and conversion period < 18 months.

source.reg: Issue of convertible debt instruments for financing
source.span_hint: An issuer shall not issue convertible debt instruments

title: Warrants consideration forfeiture
text: d) in case the warrant holder does not exercise the option to take equity shares against any of the warrants held by the warrant holder, within three months from the date of payment of consideration, such consideration made in respect of such warrants shall be forfeited by the issuer.
notes: Map to warrant_exercise_deadline and forfeiture if not exercised.

source.span_hint: in case the warrant holder does not exercise the option

title: Minimum promoters' capital requirement
text: The promoters of the issuer shall hold at least twenty per cent. of the post-issue capital:
notes: Map to promoters_holding >= 20%.

source.span_hint: The promoters of the issuer shall hold at least twenty per cent.

title: Shortfall contribution by others
text: Provided that in case the post-issue shareholding of the promoters is less than twenty per cent., alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India or any non-individual public shareholder holding at least five per cent. of the post-issue capital or any entity (individual or non-individual) forming part of promoter group other than the promoter(s) may contribute to meet the shortfall in minimum contribution as specified for the promoters, subject to a maximum of ten per cent. of the post-issue capital without being identified as promoter(s).
notes: Map to shortfall_covered by entities, max 10%.

source.span_hint: Provided that in case the post-issue shareholding

title: Requirement not applicable if no identifiable promoter
text: Provided further that the requirement of minimum promoters’ contribution shall not apply in case an issuer does not have any identifiable promoter.
notes: Map to no_promoter_exception.

source.span_hint: Provided further that the requirement of minimum promoters’ contribution shall not apply

title: Promoters' contribution method
text: a) the promoters shall contribute twenty per cent. as stipulated in sub-regulation (1), either by way of equity shares or by way of subscription to convertible securities: Provided that if the price of the equity shares allotted pursuant to conversion is not pre-determined and not disclosed in the offer document, the promoters shall contribute only by way of subscription to the convertible securities being issued in the public issue and shall undertake in writing to subscribe to the equity shares pursuant to conversion of such securities.
notes: Map to promoters_contribution method, including equity or convertible securities, with conditions on price determination.

source.span_hint: the promoters shall contribute twenty per cent.

title: Conversion price condition for promoters' contribution
text: b) in case of any issue of convertible securities which are convertible or exchangeable on different dates and if the promoters’ contribution is by way of equity shares (conversion price being pre-determined), such contribution shall not be at a price lower than the weighted average price of the equity share capital arising out of conversion of such securities.
notes: Ensure conversion price not lower than weighted average, for convertible securities with pre-determined price.

source.span_hint: in case of any issue of convertible securities

title: Promoters' contribution for convertible debt IPO
text: c) subject to the provisions of clause (a) and (b) above, in case of an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments without a prior public issue of equity shares, the promoters shall bring in a contribution of at least twenty per cent. of the project cost in the form of equity shares, subject to contributing at least twenty per cent. of the issue size from their own funds in the form of equity shares: Provided that if the project is to be implemented in stages, the promoters’ contribution shall be with respect to total equity participation till the respective stage vis-à-vis the debt raised or proposed to be raised through the public issue.
notes: Minimum 20% project cost as equity, 20% issue size from own funds, with staged implementation conditions.

source.span_hint: in case of an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments

title: Ineligibility for securities acquired non-cash with revaluation
text: specified securities acquired during the preceding three years, if these are: acquired for consideration other than cash and revaluation of assets or capitalisation of intangible assets is involved in such transaction;
notes: Map to ineligible securities if acquired non-cash with revaluation or capitalisation.

source.reg: Securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution 15. (1)
source.span_hint: acquired during the preceding three years

title: Ineligibility for securities from bonus issues using certain reserves
text: resulting from a bonus issue by utilisation of revaluation reserves or unrealised profits of the issuer or from bonus issue against equity shares which are ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution;
notes: Map to ineligible securities from bonus issues using revaluation or unrealised profits reserves.

source.reg: Securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution 15. (1)
source.span_hint: resulting from a bonus issue

title: Ineligibility for securities acquired by certain entities at lower price
text: specified securities acquired by the promoters and alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India or any non-individual public shareholder holding at least five per cent. of the post-issue capital or any entity (individual or non-individual) forming part of promoter group other than the promoter(s), during the preceding one year at a price lower than the price at which specified securities are being offered to the public in the initial public offer:
notes: Map to ineligible securities if acquired by listed entities at lower price than public offer.

source.reg: Securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution 15. (1)
source.span_hint: acquired by the promoters and alternative investment funds

title: Acquisition of securities under approved schemes
text: if such specified securities are acquired in terms of the scheme under sections 230 to 234 of the Companies Act, 2013, as approved by a High Court or a tribunal or the Central Government, as applicable, by the promoters in lieu of business and invested capital that had been in existence for a period of more than one year prior to such approval;
notes: Map to securities acquired under specific conditions, with business and invested capital existing for >1 year.

source.span_hint: if such specified securities are acquired

title: Exception for securities acquired via court-approved schemes
text: Provided that specified securities allotted to the promoters against the capital existing in such firms for a period of more than one year on a continuous basis, shall be eligible.
notes: Map to has_issuer_from_conversion, has_unchanged_management, has_ownership_period > 1 year.

source.span_hint: Provided that specified securities allotted to the promoters against the capital existing

title: Lock-in for minimum promoters' contribution
text: a) minimum promoters’ contribution including contribution made by alternative investment funds or foreign venture capital investors or scheduled commercial banks or public financial institutions or insurance companies registered with Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India or any non-individual public shareholder holding at least five per cent. of the post-issue capital or any entity (individual or non-individual) forming part of promoter group other than the promoter(s) referred to in proviso to sub-regulation (1) of regulation 14, shall be locked-in for a period of eighteen months from the date of allotment in the initial public offer: Provided that in case the majority of the issue proceeds excluding the portion of offer for sale is proposed to be utilized for capital expenditure, then the lock-in period shall be three years from the date of allotment in the initial public offer.
notes: Map to promoter_contribution lock-in period of 18 months, extendable to 3 years if majority proceeds for capital expenditure.

source.span_hint: minimum promoters’ contribution shall be locked-in

title: Lock-in for SR equity shares
text: The SR equity shares shall be under lock-in until conversion into equity shares having voting rights same as that of ordinary shares or shall be locked-in for a period specified in sub-regulations (1), whichever is later.
notes: Map to lock_in_period for specified rights, with reference to sub-regulations.

source.span_hint: SR equity shares shall be under lock-in

title: Holding period for converted securities
text: For the purpose of clause (c), in case such equity shares have resulted pursuant to conversion of fully paid-up compulsorily convertible securities, the holding period of such convertible securities as well as that of resultant equity shares together shall be considered for the purpose of calculation of six months period, and convertible securities shall be deemed to be fully paid-up, if the entire consideration payable thereon has been paid and no further consideration is payable at the time of their conversion.
notes: Map to holding_period (combined) and lock_in_period (6 months).

source.span_hint: holding period of such convertible securities

title: Equity shares from bonus against ESOP/SAR
text: For the purpose of clauses (a) and (b), equity shares shall include any equity shares allotted pursuant to a bonus issue against equity shares allotted pursuant to an employee stock option or employee stock purchase scheme or a stock appreciation right scheme.
notes: Map to equity_shares including those from ESOP/SAR schemes.

source.span_hint: equity shares shall include any equity shares allotted

title: Lock-in exemption for greenshoe securities
text: The lock-in provisions shall not apply with respect to the specified securities lent to stabilising agent for the purpose of green shoe option, during the period starting from the date of exercise of the green shoe option.
notes: Map to lock_in_exempt for greenshoe securities.

source.span_hint: lock-in provisions shall not apply

title: Lock-in period for lent securities
text: lending of such specified securities and ending on the date on which they are returned to the lender in terms of sub-regulation (5) or (6) of regulation 57: Provided that the specified securities shall be locked-in for the remaining period from the date on which they are returned to the lender.
notes: Map to lock-in periods based on lending and return dates.

source.span_hint: lending of such specified securities

title: Lock-in extension for partly paid securities
text: If the specified securities which are subject to lock-in are partly paid-up and the amount called-up on such specified securities is less than the amount called-up on the specified securities issued to the public, the lock-in shall end only on the expiry of three years after such specified securities have become pari passu with the specified securities issued to the public.
notes: Check if securities are partly paid, amount called-up less, then lock-in extends until pari passu.

source.span_hint: If the specified securities which are subject to lock-in

title: Non-transferability inscription on certificates
text: The certificates of specified securities which are subject to lock-in shall contain the inscription “non-transferable” and specify the lock-in period and in case such specified securities are dematerialised, the issuer shall ensure that the lock-in is recorded by the depository.
notes: Ensure certificates have 'non-transferable' inscription and lock-in period specified.

source.span_hint: The certificates of specified securities which are subject to lock-in shall contain

title: Pledge condition for clause (a) of regulation 16
text: if the specified securities are locked-in in terms of clause (a) of regulation 16, the loan has been granted to the issuer company or its subsidiary(ies) for the purpose of financing one or more of the objects of the issue and pledge of specified securities is one of the terms of sanction of the loan.
notes: Map to loan purposes and pledge terms for securities locked-in under clause (a).

source.span_hint: if the specified securities are locked-in in terms of clause (a) of regulation 16

title: Pledge condition for clause (b) of regulation 16
text: if the specified securities are locked-in in terms of clause (b) of regulation 16 and the pledge of specified securities is one of the terms of sanction of the loan.
notes: Ensure pledge is part of loan terms for securities locked-in under clause (b).

source.span_hint: if the specified securities are locked-in in terms of clause (b) of regulation 16

title: Lock-in continuation during pledge
text: Provided that such lock-in shall continue pursuant to the invocation of the pledge and such transferee shall not be eligible to transfer the specified securities till the lock-in period stipulated in these regulations has expired.
notes: Lock-in persists during pledge, no transfer until lock-in ends.

source.span_hint: Provided that such lock-in shall continue

title: Transfer of specified securities permitted
text: Subject to the provisions of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, the specified securities69[, except SR equity shares,] held by the promoters and locked-in as per regulation 16, may be transferred to another promoter or any person of the promoter group or a new promoter and the specified securities held by persons other than the promoters and locked-in as per regulation 17, may be transferred to any other person holding the specified securities which are locked-in along with the securities proposed to be transferred
notes: Maps to transfer eligibility for promoters and other stakeholders.

source.span_hint: Subject to the provisions

title: Lock-in period continues with transferee
text: Provided that the lock-in on such specified securities shall continue for the remaining period with the transferee and such transferee shall not be eligible to transfer them till the lock-in period stipulated in these regulations has expired.
notes: Ensures lock-in persists after transfer, preventing early transfer.

source.span_hint: Provided that the lock-in

title: Appoint lead managers
text: The issuer shall appoint one or more merchant bankers, which are registered with the Board, as lead manager(s) to the issue.
notes: Map to has_lead_managers, ensuring at least one registered merchant banker.

source.span_hint: The issuer shall appoint

title: Predetermine and disclose lead manager roles
text: Where the issue is managed by more than one lead manager, the rights, obligations and responsibilities, relating inter alia to disclosures, allotment, refund and underwriting obligations, if any, of each lead manager shall be predetermined and be disclosed in the draft offer document and the offer document as specified in Schedule I.
notes: Includes checks for multiple lead managers and mandatory disclosure.

source.span_hint: Where the issue is managed

title: Lead manager not associate or disclose limited role
text: At least one lead manager to the issue shall not be an associate (as defined under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Merchant Bankers) Regulations, 1992) of the issuer and if any of the lead manager is an associate of the issuer, it shall disclose itself as an associate of the issuer and its role shall be limited to marketing of the issue.
notes: Ensures no lead manager is an associate or handles it properly if they are.

source.span_hint: At least one lead manager

title: Appoint other intermediaries after capability assessment
text: The issuer shall, in consultation with the lead manager(s), appoint other intermediaries which are registered with the Board after the lead manager(s) have independently assessed the capability of other intermediaries to carry out their obligations.
notes: Map to intermediary appointment process, requiring independent assessment.

source.span_hint: The issuer shall, in consultation

title: Enter into agreements with specified format
text: The issuer shall enter into an agreement with the lead manager(s) in the format specified in Schedule II and enter into agreements with other intermediaries as required under the respective regulations applicable to the intermediary concerned
notes: Agreements must be in standard format for lead managers and other intermediaries.

source.span_hint: The issuer shall enter into

title: Agreements may include additional clauses without limiting liabilities
text: Provided that such agreements may include such other clauses as the issuer and the intermediaries may deem fit without diminishing or limiting in any way the liabilities and obligations of the lead
notes: Carve-out for additional clauses in agreements, ensuring no reduction in liabilities.

source.span_hint: Provided that such agreements
